About 20 officers inspected six eateries along Penang Road. A total of 10 compounds, ranging from RM100 to RM250, were also issued during the health inspection. MBPP Senior Health Officer Goh Eng Choon said the inspection aims to heighten the level of cleanliness of eateries in Penang.
